'''Baltimn''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. It was here that [[Ephaan Kenzon]] established the [[School of Hidden Wisdom]], the only dueling academy to survive the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and the rise of [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor Palpatine]]. Despite its pleasant environment, Baltimn's remote location made it inaccessible for many tourists.<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}
